title: Companies dominated by startups and tech with lean design teams
summary: Startup and tech companies account for 63.1% of respondents combined. Design teams are lean: 81.9% have fewer than 10 people, with 22.6% working as solo designers. Hybrid work is the most common at 36%, with 24.9% fully remote.
methodology: Self-reported company type, design team size, and work arrangement in anonymous online survey
